command.bananaclaims.permission_denied: You do not have permission to use that Banana Claims command.
command.bananaclaims.error.players_only: Only players can use this command.
command.bananaclaims.error.cannot_manage: You cannot manage a claim named "%s".
command.bananaclaims.error.not_owner: You do not own this claim.

command.bananaclaims.createarea.position: You must set both claim positions first.
command.bananaclaims.createarea.same_dim: Both claim positions must be in the same dimension.
command.bananaclaims.createarea.overlap: The selected area contains already claimed chunks.
command.bananaclaims.createarea.failed: The selected area could not be claimed.
command.bananaclaims.description.no_clai: There is no claim here. To update a claim remotely, use /claim description <claim> <description>.
command.bananaclaims.flag.cannot_edit: You cannot edit flags for claim "%s".
command.bananaclaims.flag.players_only: Only players can edit claim flags.

command.bananaclaims.leave.not_participa: You do not participate in a claim named "%s".
command.bananaclaims.leave.subowner_succ: You stepped down as a subowner of claim "%s" and remain a regular member.

command.bananaclaims.leave.not_participa: You are not a member or subowner of claim "%s".
command.bananaclaims.leave.owner_notice_: %s stepped down as a subowner of claim "%s" and remains a regular member.
command.bananaclaims.list.empty: You do not own any claims.
command.bananaclaims.popup.preview_playe: Only players can preview claim popups.

command.bananaclaims.popup.cannot_edit: You cannot edit popup settings for claim "%s".
command.bananaclaims.popup.invalid_mode: Invalid popup mode. Use ACTIONBAR, TITLE, or CHAT.
command.bananaclaims.preview.no_managed_: You do not manage any claims in this dimension.
command.bananaclaims.preview.none_active: You do not have an active claim preview.
command.bananaclaims.preview.other_dimen: That claim is in another dimension.
command.bananaclaims.preview.failed: Unable to create a preview for that claim.
command.bananaclaims.preview.success: Showing the 3D boundary for claim "%s" for %s.

command.bananaclaims.selection.preview_f: Unable to create a preview for that selection.
command.bananaclaims.selection.preview_s: Showing the full-height 3D selection boundary for %s.
command.bananaclaims.shrink.not_part: This chunk is not part of claim "%s".
command.bananaclaims.shrink.last_chunk: You cannot shrink the last chunk of a claim. Use /claim delete instead.
command.bananaclaims.transfer.success_ac: Transferred ownership of claim "%s" to %s. You are now a member of the claim.
command.bananaclaims.transfer.success_ta: %s transferred ownership of claim "%s" to you.
command.bananaclaims.transfer.duplicate_: %s already owns a claim named "%s". Rename one of the claims before transferring ownership.
command.bananaclaims.transfer.not_owner: Only the current owner can transfer this claim.
command.bananaclaims.transfer.failed: Unable to transfer ownership of that claim.
command.bananaclaims.member.add.success_: Added %s as a member of claim "%s".
You were added as a member of claim "%s" by %s.

command.bananaclaims.member.add.member: %s is already a member of claim "%s".

command.bananaclaims.member.add.failed: Unable to add that player as a member.
command.bananaclaims.member.remove.not_m: "%s" is not a regular member of claim "%s".
command.bananaclaims.member.remove.succe: You were removed from claim "%s" by %s.

command.bananaclaims.subowner.add.failed: Unable to add that player as a subowner.
command.bananaclaims.subowner.remove.not: "%s" is not a subowner of claim "%s".

command.bananaclaims.subowner.remove.suc: Removed %s as a subowner of claim "%s". They remain a regular member.
